name: Ailite Dry Cabinet See Through GPG-90LA
description: AILITE GPG-90LA Dry Cabinet See Through is a special tool or box that can be used for storage media for your photography equipment such as camera bodies, lenses, batteries, filters, vertical grips, flashes and many more.

features.Key Features :: Kapasitas 1000 Liter | Size Dalam W118 x D56 x H172 cm | Nett Weight 96 Kg | Gross Weight 102 Kg | Berfungsi menyimpan kamera dan lensa atau produk lainnya | Dapat melindungi dari debu, jamur dan kelembaban | Layar LCD definisi tinggi Digital | Lampu LED | Tombol pengaturan sentuh | Hemat energi | Baki yang bisa dilepas | Rentang Kontrol Kelembaban 25% RH-65% RH
